examples: The speaker had obviously struck a chord with his audience.
This poem has struck a responsive chord in the hearts of its readers.
In himself, too, he knew that it was vibrating at last, that chord hitherto dormant and unsuspected.
Robert Steel, president and CEO of Wachovia, struck a similar chord in a press release.
His political views and forecasts will also strike a resounding chord with those he leaves behind.
